temporal_description:
(00:00-00:05) In a modern, sterile interrogation room, a man in a white shirt and tie stands with his hands clasped behind his back. He faces a table where three men in uniform are seated, observing him. The room is divided by glass partitions, and a security camera is visible in the corner. The seated men are writing on pink forms. The man in the tie stands still, awaiting instructions. (Storyline: The scene is set for an interrogation. The man in the white shirt is the suspect, and the men in uniform are the interrogators or officials. The atmosphere is tense and formal.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The distinct sound of a chair being pushed back and a pen clicking.)
(00:06-00:09) The man in the white shirt, who is the suspect, begins to speak. He looks directly at the men seated across from him, addressing them. (Storyline: The interrogation officially begins as the suspect starts to provide his statement.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral, slightly hesitant. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
